name: GasLog Partners LP 8.200% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Fixed to Floating Rate Preference Units
summary: GasLog Partners LP 8.200% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Fixed to Floating Rate Preference Units represents a preferred equity security issued by GasLog Partners LP. These units pay a fixed dividend rate that may convert to a floating rate in the future and have no maturity date, although they may be redeemed by the issuer. GasLog Partners LP is a growth-oriented limited partnership focused on owning, operating, and acquiring LNG carriers.
